title: capsella coronopus
intro: Capsella coronopus, also known as Shepherd's Purse, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stop bleeding due to its high content of compounds called saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive molecules. The health benefits of Capsella coronopus include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diarrheal properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as menorrhagia, nosebleeds, and gastrointestinal issues. Capsella coronopus can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh in salads or dried for later use in teas, infusions, and capsules.
